name: That's Not A Knife (DART AE)
location_str: Rocket Lab LC-2 (Launch Area 0 C) @ Wallops Flight Facility, USA
description: Payload is a scramjet-powered hypersonic vehicle developed by by Australian company Hypersonix.
rocket_fact: Hypergolic fuels ignite spontaneously upon contact with each other, making them reliable for restarting engines in space.
